Tython docs for AI tools.

Core reading:
- /index.md
- /getting-started.md
- /installation.md
- /language/quickstart.md
- /language/values-and-bindings.md
- /language/expressions.md
- /language/functions.md
- /language/records-and-classes.md
- /language/errors.md
- /tooling/cli.md
- /tooling/lsp.md
- /tooling/vim-neovim.md
- /reference/parser-pipeline.md
- /reference/diagnostic-schema.md
- /reference/error-codes.md

Repo rules:
- Keep parser API stable: `parse`, `parse_custom`, `lower`.
- Keep grammar edits in `grammar/`.
- Add tests for grammar changes across smoke and differential layers.
- Keep docs strict and tied to compiler behavior.
